channel.title: Politics on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Politics on MinWeb

item.title: New Orleans Has Reached a ‘Point of No Return,’ Study Finds
item.description:
If you live in New Orleans or just love it, you’ve probably felt that weird, sinking disconnect between the city’s electric culture and the increasingly grim headlines about its survival. For decades, we’ve been fed a steady diet of buzzwords like “resilience,” “protection,” and “engineering solutions.” But a massive study published in Nature Sustainability on May 4, 2026, just killed that conversation.

The research team—led by Tulane’s Torbjörn Törnqvist and Jesse Keenan, alongside Wanyun Shao from the University of Alabama—officially classified New Orleans as being in a “terminal state.” They aren’t using flowery language here. They are stating, flatly, that the city has crossed the point of no return.

item.title: What Is the 'Mamdani Act'? Inside the GOP’s New Bill
item.description: Explore the details of the controversial Mamdani Act, a new GOP bill targeting ideological figures and immigration policy, and understand its legal...

item.title: Inside the White House: The Day Trump Was Removed From Briefing
item.description: Explore the unprecedented events of April 2026, when a high-stakes rescue mission inside the White House led to the extraordinary removal of Trump from...

item.title: Trump and Joe Rogan’s New Executive Order on Psychedelics
item.description: Explore the details of the new Executive Order on psychedelic medicine, how it impacts federal funding and FDA review processes, and what it means for your...

item.title: Trump Orders Halt to Israeli Bombing of Lebanon
item.description: President Trump has ordered an immediate halt to Israeli bombing in Lebanon, marking a major geopolitical shift following months of humanitarian catastrophe.

item.title: Pope Leo XIV Denounces Global Conflict and Tyranny
item.description: Pope Leo XIV challenges the current global landscape by denouncing escalating military conflicts and political tyranny in a high-stakes standoff for peace.

item.title: Pentagon Planning Possible Military Operation in Cuba
item.description: Explore the facts behind reports of a potential Pentagon military operation in Cuba as we examine the risks, current geopolitical climate, and real impact.

item.title: Trump Orders Strait of Hormuz Blockade After Talks Fail
item.description: Understand the timeline and strategic escalation behind the U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following the collapse of high-stakes peace...

item.title: Alaska’s Ranked-Choice Voting Faces New Repeal Effort
item.description: Alaska is heading to the polls again to decide the fate of ranked-choice voting; discover the core arguments behind the push to repeal this electoral system.

item.title: US Government Demands Reddit Identify ICE Critic
item.description: A recent legal battle between the US government and Reddit highlights the fragile nature of digital privacy as federal agents pursue an anonymous ICE critic.

item.title: U.S.-Iran Standoff: Analyzing the April 7 Deadline Risks
item.description: Understand the reality behind the U.S.-Iran April 7 deadline by analyzing the core geopolitical demands, economic stakes, and risks of this global standoff.

item.title: Trump’s Strait of Hormuz Ultimatum: What You Need to Know
item.description: Understand the geopolitical stakes behind Trump’s ultimatum regarding the Strait of Hormuz and how this escalation impacts global oil and regional security.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz Blockade: Economic Impact and U.S. Response
item.description: Explore the economic consequences of the Strait of Hormuz blockade and understand how this critical energy choke point is impacting global trade and markets.

item.title: Trump Fires AG Bondi: Todd Blanche Named New Attorney General
item.description: President Trump has fired Attorney General Pam Bondi, appointing Todd Blanche to lead the DOJ amid a broader administration shakeup and internal policy shifts.

item.title: Why Ukraine's Drone Makers Are Building Factories Abroad
item.description: Discover why Ukrainian drone innovators are secretly building factories abroad to navigate wartime export bans and sustain rapid, survival-driven production.

item.title: Trump’s 200-Year Life Claim: Political Hype vs. Reality
item.description: Explore why claims of 200-year lifespans are political distractions that divert crucial funding from practical healthcare toward billionaire vanity projects.
